The Admiral: Roaring Currents

명량

"12 ships against a fleet of 330."

7.0
2014MOVIEReleased

Synopsis

Admiral Yi Sun-sin faces a tough challenge when he is forced to defend his nation with just 13 battleships against 300 Japanese enemy ships in the Battle of Myeongryang.

Tags

navybiographybased on true storybattleshipnaval warfare16th centurybattle of myeongryangjapanese invasion of koreakorean navyjoseon dynasty (1392–1910)yi sun-sinimjin war
